$comment: Machine-readable CipheX brand manifest. For humans, see README.md; for the authoritative rules, see the CipheX Brand Design Guide. For AI/LLM consumption, see llms.txt. Transcribed from the guide — if anything here disagrees with it, the guide wins.

brand.name: CipheX
brand.description: CipheX is capital-markets infrastructure for the tokenized economy, bridging traditional finance and digital assets. The ecosystem is pre-commercial, with target timelines in 2026–2027.

voice.principle: Write like an operator, not a crypto promoter.
do: Use the mixed-typeface headline: a sans line with one italic emphasis phrase.
dont: Hype, vaporware language, or 'to the moon' framing.
More than one or two emphasized moments per layout.

ecosystem.note: The lead wordmark; everything ladders up to it.
Ecosystem & utility token — access, incentives, liquidity coordination.
Autonomous execution & portfolio management via the Abigail system. Non-custodial.
Real-world asset origination, tokenization & global distribution.
The infrastructure brand credited beneath the ecosystem.

logo.clearSpace: 1× the mark height on all sides

color.rule: Warm cream grounds, one institutional-blue accent used decisively. Never pure white or pure black. Status colors are functional/data-viz only, never brand accents.
color.darkText: cream (#fbfaf6) stepped down in opacity — 0.92 / 0.72 / 0.55 / 0.45, never grey

typography.rule: Three voices, one system — they take turns, never compete. All open-source.

sans.role: Digital voice — body, UI labels, the sans lead-in of headlines.

serif.role: Traditional-finance voice — the italic emphasis phrase, editorial titles, large stat figures.

mono.role: Terminal voice — eyebrows, tags, data labels, dates, meta. Always uppercase.

imagery.rule: Geometry and data, never stock crypto.

compliance.rule: Route all copy through brand review before publishing.
